metadata.description: Standards bypass configuration for this branch

bypass.reason: Subprocess IPC script — print(json.dumps()) outputs JSON to stdout for parent process. Not display output.
Self-contained subprocess — no branch imports by design
Self-contained subprocess — no branch imports by design
Subprocess IPC script — print(json.dumps()) outputs JSON to stdout for parent process. Not display output.
Subprocess IPC — print() is the output mechanism (JSON to stdout). Not debug output.
Self-contained subprocess — cannot import prax logger. Uses stdlib logging.
Self-contained subprocess — runs in memory venv without aipass package. Cannot import prax. Uses stdlib logging.
Self-contained subprocess — runs in memory venv without aipass package. Cannot import prax. Uses stdlib logging.getLogger().
Subprocess IPC — print(json.dumps()) is the output mechanism (JSON to stdout). Not debug output.
_clients is a module-level mutable cache (dict), not a constant. Lowercase is appropriate.
Templates module orchestrates 6 subcommands across 3 handlers — splitting further would fragment related orchestration.
Symbolic module is 1669 lines — legacy port from old memory bank. Functions flagged as implementation are CLI-display orchestration, not raw logic.
process_plans_command is a thin CLI wrapper that delegates to plans_processor handler. Orchestration, not implementation.
Architectural: imports json.memory_files for template read/write operations. Memory handlers share json I/O by design.
Architectural: imports json.memory_files for memory file read/write during rollover extraction.
Architectural: rollover orchestrator coordinates monitor, tracking, storage, dashboard, intake, and trigger handlers. Central pipeline hub.
Architectural: imports json.memory_files for learning data read/write and vector.embedder for semantic operations.
Architectural: watcher coordinates tracking, rollover, intake, and archive handlers for auto-rollover pipeline.
Architectural: imports vector.embedder for semantic search across symbolic fragments.
Architectural: imports vector.embedder for embedding symbolic fragments into ChromaDB.
Architectural: imports json.memory_files for reading memory data during symbolic extraction hooks.
Architectural: imports json.memory_files for metadata updates and monitor.detector for registry reading.
Architectural: imports storage.chroma for ChromaDB client access during vector search.
stdlib logging.getLogger() used at import-time before prax is available. Immediately replaced by get_system_logger() 3 lines below.

fields.standard: Standard name: cli, imports, naming, etc. (required)
fields.lines: Optional - specific line numbers to bypass
